scripts.start:all: concurrently -n AUTH,INTERN,TASKS,CONFIG,PROJECTS,NOTIFY,ANALYTICS,AUDIT,GATEWAY -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan,white,red,gray "npm start --prefix backend/services/auth-service" "npm start --prefix backend/services/intern-service" "npm start --prefix backend/services/tasks-service" "npm start --prefix backend/services/config-service" "npm start --prefix backend/services/projects-service" "npm start --prefix backend/services/notification-service" "npm start --prefix backend/services/analytics-service" "npm start --prefix backend/services/audit-service" "npm start --prefix backend/gateway"
